title: Improve parameterization algorithm for SV modules/classes (#4497)

features.name: parameterized class with bit vector parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a bit vector type parameter that demonstrates truncation behavior where different literal values should map to the same parameterization

features.name: class with type parameter and value parameter
features.description: Code should include a class parameterized with both a type parameter and a value parameter, where the type affects constant folding behavior

features.name: parameter with explicit type cast
features.description: Code should include a parameter assigned with an explicit type cast that may lose signedness during constant folding
